channel.title: Journal of Applied Analysis
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Applied Analysis

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Nadhem Echi, Fehmi Mabrouk, Faouzi Omri DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jaa-2024-frontmatter2

item.title: Controllability result in α-norm for some impulsive partial functional integrodifferential equation with infinite delay in Banach spaces

item.title: Polynomial convergence of iterations of certain random operators in Hilbert space
item.description: Article by Nadhem Echi, Fehmi Mabrouk, Faouzi Omri DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jaa-2023-0115

item.title: Almost compactness in neutrosophic topological spaces

item.title: Some results for a weakly coupled system of semi-linear structurally damped σ-evolution equations

item.title: A brief survey on the development and applications of Goebel’s coincidence point theorem in differential and integral equations

item.description: Article by Nadhem Echi, Fehmi Mabrouk, Faouzi Omri DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jaa-2023-0125

item.title: On random pairwise comparisons matrices and their geometry

item.title: Exponential stability of non-conformable fractional-order systems
